title: XEnchant
description: A mod to enhance the /enchant command
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9F6ODW4PIT0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Ever felt like the enchant command was a bit limiting?

Now you can easily enchant anything you want!

## Example

```
/enchant @p sharpness 1000
```

There should be no limits on your enchantment or where you can apply it.

It also will display enchantments in roman numerals up to and including 1000 (M).

Have fun!

P.S. Only versions of the mod that are 1.0.4 and higher will work. If you downloaded any earlier versions, please forgive me as I forgot some functionality code.

I am the author of this mod, and have reuploaded it from its original CurseForge page, [located here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xenchant).
